name_en: Extraordinary Original Leather M24706 This Capucines East West mini bag is crafted from deeply dyed lambskin, featuring Monogram floral motifs and faux crystals integrated into the top handle. It presents a striking contrast between lustrous metal and deep leather, playing with the LV monogram. A detachable and adjustable chain and leather shoulder strap allow for shoulder carrying. Dimensions: 22 × 12 × 8 cm
